title: Fayssal Zeggar - Data Engineer
headline: Fayssal Zeggar
lead: I turn regulated manufacturing data into reliable datasets, dashboards, and practical access for technical users.
summary: I work in regulated pharmaceutical manufacturing data environments, where reliability, traceability, and practical access for technical users matter as much as the pipeline code.

sections.label: What I do at work
sections.title: Reliable data work in a regulated environment.
sections.body: I structure manufacturing process data so it can be trusted, queried, and reused. I move reporting sources into Snowflake-backed models with clearer ownership and lineage, and I support users with simpler access to validated analytical data.

sections.label: How I work
sections.title: Practical delivery, not isolated demos.
sections.body: My projects are built around traceability, data quality, and useful access patterns. I like systems where the path from raw evidence to a dashboard, API, or application can be explained clearly.
